detail.description: Romy Gonzalez grounds out, shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda.
Romy Gonzalez singles on a fly ball to right fielder Dylan Crews. Ceddanne Rafaela to 3rd. Willson Contreras to 2nd.
Romy Gonzalez grounds out, second baseman Jorbit Vivas to first baseman Andrés Chaparro.
Romy Gonzalez singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Dylan Crews.
Romy Gonzalez grounds out, pitcher Cade Cavalli to first baseman Luis García Jr.
Romy Gonzalez grounds into a double play, shortstop Anthony Volpe to second baseman José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Willson Contreras out at 2nd. Romy Gonzalez out at 1st.
Romy Gonzalez grounds out, second baseman José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice.
Romy Gonzalez grounds out, pitcher Carlos Rodón to first baseman Ben Rice. Wilyer Abreu to 3rd. Willson Contreras to 2nd.
Romy Gonzalez grounds out to first baseman Ben Rice.
Romy Gonzalez lines out to right fielder Jo Adell.
Romy Gonzalez homers (1) on a fly ball to left field. Wilyer Abreu scores.
Romy Gonzalez grounds out, third baseman Denzer Guzman to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.
Romy Gonzalez flies out sharply to right fielder Jo Adell.
Romy Gonzalez singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Jose Siri.
Romy Gonzalez singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Wilyer Abreu scores. Willson Contreras scores. Caleb Durbin to 3rd.
Romy Gonzalez triples (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell.
Romy Gonzalez reaches on a fielder's choice. Ceddanne Rafaela to 2nd. Ceddanne Rafaela advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by shortstop Francisco Lindor.
Romy Gonzalez grounds out, second baseman Zack Short to first baseman Eric Wagaman.
Romy Gonzalez grounds out, second baseman Zack Short to first baseman Eric Wagaman.
Romy Gonzalez flies out to center fielder Tyrone Taylor.
Romy Gonzalez grounds into a force out, shortstop Francisco Lindor to second baseman Zack Short. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 2nd. Romy Gonzalez to 1st.
Romy Gonzalez grounds into a force out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to second baseman Chase Meidroth. Ceddanne Rafaela out at 2nd.
Romy Gonzalez singles on a line drive to center fielder Junior Perez.
Romy Gonzalez singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Colson Montgomery. Ceddanne Rafaela to 2nd.
Romy Gonzalez doubles (1) on a ground ball to right fielder Junior Perez. Willson Contreras scores.
Romy Gonzalez grounds out, shortstop Luisangel Acuña to first baseman Miguel Vargas.
